s: In 2022, Ken Waldichuk suited up for OAK as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.930, WHIP 1.210, SO 33, WAR 0.300.
In 2023, Ken Waldichuk suited up for OAK as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.360, WHIP 1.560, SO 132, WAR -0.200.
Changed teams after the previous season (OAK -> WSN).
In 2026, Ken Waldichuk suited up for WSN as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.060, WHIP 1.500, SO 5, WAR -0.200. Notable context: Joined WSN.
